things.name: Hohensalzburg Fortress
things.description: One of Europe's best-preserved medieval castles looming above the old town since 1077

things.name: Mozart's Birthplace
things.description: Museum in the house where Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart was born in 1756 on Getreidegasse

things.name: Mirabell Palace & Gardens
things.description: Baroque palace and formal gardens featured in The Sound of Music — do-re-mi staircase

things.name: Salzburg Old Town (Altstadt)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage baroque old town with the Getreidegasse shopping street and cathedral

things.name: Hallstatt Day Trip
things.description: Impossibly picturesque lakeside village 75 km away — one of the world's most beautiful villages

things.name: Salzburg Cathedral
things.description: Magnificent early Baroque cathedral with three organs and a treasury of religious art

things.name: Hellbrunn Palace & Trick Fountains
things.description: 17th-century pleasure palace with the world's oldest baroque trick fountain gardens

things.name: Sound of Music Tour
things.description: Follow the movie locations through Salzburg city and the surrounding Salzkammergut lakes

things.name: Untersberg Mountain
things.description: Cable car to 1,776 m on the mountain straddling Austria and Germany with panoramic alpine views

things.name: Museum der Moderne Monchsberg
things.description: Contemporary art museum perched on a cliffside above the old town with sweeping city views
